calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
John Thomas, Special Assets Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Energy Power, LLC, fdba Morgan Electric Company, LLC, or Morgan Electric Southeast, LLC, fdba Morgan Electric Company, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 18, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Energy Power, LLC, fdba Morgan Electric Company, LLC, and Morgan Electric Southeast, LLC, fdba Morgan Electric Company, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,704.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,707.23.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $531.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,442.51.

The Court further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set for in Paragraph Three of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
